attrs.comment: Pixel offsets tracked using Imcorr. Input files were /snufkin/projects/cci/s2raw/s2raw/20XNQ/2017-05-02/Seq00/B02.tiff and /snufkin/projects/cci/s2raw/s2raw/20XNQ/2017-05-17/Seq00/B02.tiff. Intrinsic S2 shift (faulty georeferencing) estimated  as (x,y) = (-0.6490, 0.0868) pixels. Shift was corrected. Pixel offsets converted to m/day using scaling dx_in_meters/dt_in_days = 10.0/15.0 = 0.7.
attrs.history: 2018-04-27 12:25:46 | Combined 5 input files ['/snufkin/projects/cci/ensemble/20XNQ/2017-05-01_to_2017-05-14/2017-05-02_Seq00_to_2017-05-17_Seq00.nc', '/snufkin/projects/cci/ensemble/20XNQ/2017-05-01_to_2017-05-14/2017-05-02_Seq00_to_2017-05-17_Seq01.nc', '/snufkin/projects/cci/ensemble/20XNQ/2017-05-01_to_2017-05-14/2017-05-01_Seq00_to_2017-05-16_Seq00.nc', '/snufkin/projects/cci/ensemble/20XNQ/2017-05-01_to_2017-05-14/2017-05-02_Seq00_to_2017-05-16_Seq00.nc', '/snufkin/projects/cci/ensemble/20XNQ/2017-05-01_to_2017-05-14/2017-05-01_Seq00_to_2017-05-17_Seq00.nc'] by weighted average. Weights were cubed inverse RMS of velocity field. RMS was computed with 5x5 kernel.
attrs.summary: Ice Velocity seasonal product of Petermann Glacier from Sentinel-2 data acquired between the 2017-05-01 and 2017-09-14
attrs.title: Petermann_Seasonal_20170501_20170914
